title: WP_PAGE_1953_CREAZIONE_SITI_TRANSLATION_2026-06-05.md
text:
# WP Page 1953 Creazione Siti Translation - 2026-06-05

## Scope
- Page: `https://www.skinharmony.it/creazione-siti-skinharmony/`
- WordPress post ID: `1953`
- Languages: `en`, `fr`, `de`, `es`
- Method: SkinHarmony Core Translator REST workflow with Core Codex Connector gate.

## Core / Nyra Gate
- Action type: `publish`
- Verdict: `ALLOWED`
- Risk: `low`
- Owner confirmation: `false`
- Report: `reports/codex-core/codex_core_gate_latest.json`

## Translation Run
- Provider status: OK
- Provider: `openai`
- Model: `gpt-4.1-mini`
- Page strings extracted: `66`
- Batch command: `SH_TRANSLATE_LANGS=en,fr,de,es SH_TRANSLATE_BLOCK_SIZE=10 node scripts/translate_wp_site_stepwise.js 1953`
- Batch report: `reports/wp_site_translation_stepwise_2026-06-05.json`
- Result: `66/66` generated for each target language.

## Review Approval
- `en`: `66` approved, pending count after workflow `0`
- `fr`: `66` approved, pending count after workflow `0`
- `de`: `66` approved, pending count after workflow `0`
- `es`: `66` approved, pending count after workflow `0`

Review approvals were executed in small batches through `review/approve`, scoped to `object_id=1953`, to avoid timeout on full-language bundle transitions.

## Runtime Verification
Sample runtime lookups returned translated text for the page headline and CTA.

Source:
`Siti belli, chiari e pronti a vendere per centri beauty, saloni e brand locali.`

- EN: `Beautiful, clear, and ready-to-sell sites for beauty centers, salons, and local brands.`
- FR: `Sites beaux, clairs et prêts à vendre pour centres de beaute, salons et marques locales.`
- DE: `Schöne, klare und verkaufsbereite Websites für Beauty-Zentren, Salons und lokale Marken.`
- ES: `Sitios atractivos, claros y listos para vender para centros de belleza, salones y marcas locales.`

Source:
`Richiedi proposta`

- EN: `Request proposal`
- FR: `Demandez une proposition`
- DE: `Angebot anfordern`
- ES: `Solicitar propuesta`

## Public Route Verification
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/en/creazione-siti-skinharmony/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/fr/creazione-siti-skinharmony/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/de/creazione-siti-skinharmony/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/es/creazione-siti-skinharmony/`: `200`

Checked Italian residuals:
- Italian headline sample absent on all four public language routes.
- Italian CTA `Richiedi proposta` absent on all four public language routes.
- Runtime translation samples found in public HTML for all four public language routes.

## Boundaries
- Italian source content was not modified.
- No price changes.
- No plugin code changes.
- No tenant, key, checkout, CRM or customer data changes.
